task_completed.title: 🎉 Task Completed!
task_completed.body: Congratulations! You completed the task "{{title}}" and earned {{reward}} points!

all_tasks_completed.title: 🏆 Perfect Attendance Bonus!
all_tasks_completed.body: Amazing! You've completed all daily tasks today. Keep it up tomorrow!

streak_reward.title: 🔥 {{days}} Day Streak!
streak_reward.body: You've completed all daily tasks for {{days}} consecutive days! Keep going for even better rewards!

task_reminder.title: ⏰ Tasks Not Completed
task_reminder.body: You still have unfinished tasks today. Complete all tasks for bonus rewards!
